Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}Some real weird crap happened a month ago, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}Like when all those people went outside at midnight? What was that all about?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}Though, to be honest, it was kinda cool. Felt like the climax of a movie.[n]{f 1 1}
